notes: v1.14.53 - ENTER BUTTON REDESIGN 'GATEWAY' (cool-chrome pivot; replaces the v1.14.52 gold DOWNLINK hex). Scope-locked to the entry hold-to-enter button only (globe/mesh/wordmark/taglines/CAL/layout + hold-charge JS all FROZEN/untouched). Concept: a machined concentric-ring PORT - brushed-steel bezel + precise rings, top-lit from a single source (the globe above; lighter top -> darker bottom on every ring), a cyan-white luminous core, HOLD centered. PALETTE pivoted gold -> COOL CHROME: cyan #28e0ff + violet #8a4bff + steel + near-black. NO red, NO rainbow on the button (the wordmark still owns the spectrum; the button does not compete). IDLE: the cyan-white core breathes low/slow; faint cyan filament threads rise from the port up into the wordmark (the .pe-gw-fil layer is now ON by default - the 'control is the terminus of the system above it'). PRESS/HOLD ('quantum gateway' confirm): on the press the SVG aperture surges cyan-white and a CONTAINED cyan-violet bloom (.pe-gw-bloom: a rim ring-glow + 6 particles + tendril seams) blooms once around the rim and recedes on release - controlled, premium, not chaotic. Achieved WITHOUT touching JS: #pe-portalG stops swapped to cyan->violet (#eaffff/#28e0ff/#6a7bff/#3a2f6a), #boot #pe-seams line{stroke:#5a8cff} overrides draw()'s setAttribute (CSS beats SVG presentation attrs), and the bloom keys off :not(.pe-idle). HOLD label + 'HOLD TO ENTER' recolored cyan. Implementation: CSS layers + restyled static SVG only; all scoped #boot with the pe-gw-* prefix (.pe-gw-fil/bezel/ring2/ring3/core/bloom + @keyframes pe-gw-amb/core/bloom/fil); the prior pe-dl-* (DOWNLINK) layers were fully removed (0 leftover). JS hooks preserved (#pe-stage #pe-portal #pe-hole #pe-seams #pe-rim #pe-glab #pe-flash); entry fires end-to-end (boot->app verified). reduced-motion = static premium port (no breathe/bloom/filament motion). 132px tap (>=56), zero horizontal overflow, scoped (no file-wide collisions), node --check 3/3, main <style> braces 2689/2689, four stamps lockstep v1.14.53, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. Render-verified idle/charge/reduced-motion. DEFERRED per John: the WORDMARK is still the baked iridescent image (carries magenta) - 'cool it / de-pink' was deferred to a later pass (option 2a); cooling it cleanly needs a new asset or a CSS hue filter. STILL PENDING from v1.14.49: the ?cal=1 mesh-node calibration pass.
